original_snippet_context: Discussion about the exchange market and its relation to coffee prices and gold.
relevant_quote: Em quanto for assim, correndo as próprias letras, bem vai ; quando, porém. estas tarem-se, terão de recorrer ao café, que será a vítima, ou aos recursos extraordinários no exterior, para sustentar a nota.
justification: This quote indirectly relates to the Caixa de Conversão debate by highlighting concerns about maintaining the value of currency ('sustentar a nota'). It suggests that if current measures fail, they will have to resort to extraordinary measures, possibly related to manipulating coffee prices or seeking foreign loans, implying support for interventionist, expansionist policies.
